name: Interactive Plush Toy - Sun - Cloud Island™
description:
Let the sun rise on your kid's entertainment with the Interactive Plush Toy from cloud island™. Designed in the shape of a sun, this plush toy features multiple modes of play with a hanging cloud, a star, a loop and more. The soft fabric construction makes it a perfect gift for your little one and best of all, the toy focuses on sensory development. You can easily hang it anywhere with the built-in loop.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
